title: About SkillSprint
response_template:
SkillSprint is a collaborative developer learning platform where students and mentors connect to learn, build, and grow together.

Key features include:
• Live coding sessions with real-time video and code collaboration
• Pair programming workspace with an integrated code editor and executor
• AI Mentor assistant (that's me!) for JavaScript and platform help
• Interactive quizzes to test and earn certificates
• Shared library for uploading and discovering resources
• Matchmaking to find the right learning partner
• Wallet system to manage session credits

SkillSprint is built for developers who learn best by doing — together.
